content.content:
1	"""
2	Feishu/Lark platform adapter.
3	
4	Supports:
5	- WebSocket long connection and Webhook transport
6	- Direct-message and group @mention-gated text receive/send
7	- Inbound image/file/audio/media caching
8	- Gateway allowlist integration via FEISHU_ALLOWED_USERS
9	- Persistent dedup state across restarts
10	- Per-chat serial message processing (matches openclaw createChatQueue)
11	- Persistent ACK emoji reaction on inbound messages
12	- Reaction events routed as synthetic text events (matches openclaw)
13	- Interactive card button-click events routed as synthetic COMMAND events
14	- Webhook anomaly tracking (matches openclaw createWebhookAnomalyTracker)
15	- Verification token validation as second auth layer (matches openclaw)
16	"""
17	
18	from __future__ import annotations
19	
20	import asyncio
21	import hashlib
22	import hmac
23	import json
24	import logging
25	import mimetypes
26	import os
27	import re
28	import threading
29	import time
30	import uuid
31	from dataclasses import dataclass, field
32	from datetime import datetime
33	from pathlib import Path
34	from types import SimpleNamespace
35	from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional
36	
37	# aiohttp/websockets are independent optional deps — import outside lark_oapi
38	# so they remain available for tests and webhook mode even if lark_oapi is missing.
39	try:
40	    import aiohttp
41	    from aiohttp import web
42	except ImportError:
43	    aiohttp = None  # type: ignore[assignment]
44	    web = None  # type: ignore[assignment]
45	
46	try:
47	    import websockets
48	except ImportError:
49	    websockets = None  # type: ignore[assignment]
50	
51	try:
52	    import lark_oapi as lark
53	    from lark_oapi.api.application.v6 import GetApplicationRequest
54	    from lark_oapi.api.im.v1 import (
55	        CreateFileRequest,
56	        CreateFileRequestBody,
57	        CreateImageRequest,
58	        CreateImageRequestBody,
59	        CreateMessageRequest,
60	        CreateMessageRequestBody,
